evidence.download_after_seed_probe: PRE_BASE_EXISTS=False -> ensure_base_resume seeds operator PDF as user base -> GET /resumes/{id}/download HTTP 200 PDF containing DESHPANDE + '+61 433 224 556' + 'Australian Taxation Office'

per_check.note: All 9 named paths structurally rewired to the shared helper (verified @29f4cc9): cover_letter_agent.py:1187, fit_scorer.py:45, jobs.py:198+285, email_agent.py:171+293, cover_letters.py _evidence_trace:272+370 / cover_letter_insights:347 / refine_cover_letter:422 / _sender_block resolve_user_resume_contact:~594, resume_pdf.resolve_original_pdf->Path|None + resumes.download_resume structured render + email_attachments reuses download handler. Residual get_base_resume_path usages remain only in tailor_agent.py:300/340 (see blocking issue) and read-only geometry in resume_pdf/resume_parser.

BLOCKING. Outbound generation is NOT gated on a user resume. A no-resume user (fresh signup; auth.py:97 seeds no base; agents.py:876/888 dispatch ungated) reaches OUTBOUND artifacts grounded on the operator PDF via the sanctioned fallback (resume_grounding.py:37/55). PROVEN outbound: cover-letter prompt carries operator PII. COMPOUNDING: cover_letter_agent.py:1408 -> tailor_agent.ensure_base_resume (tailor_agent.py:300-325) PERSISTS the operator PDF as the user's OWN base, whose formatHash then matches the bundled file so resolve_original_pdf (resume_pdf.py:96-99) returns the operator PDF and download_resume (resumes.py:296) serves it verbatim -> NF-final-B-005 resurrected, and every 'user-scoped' helper thereafter returns operator content.

Asymmetric contact resolver correct: resolve_user_resume_contact returns {} (own, even if empty) whenever base is not None; operator fallback only when base is None (resume_grounding.py:48-55). A user with their OWN uploaded resume never gets operator phone/LinkedIn on letterhead (test_resolve_user_resume_contact_returns_empty_dict passes). Caveat: a no-resume user's letterhead still gets operator contact once ensure_base_resume seeds it — same root cause as check 2.

Tests genuine, not tautological. All 8 fail-before @bdf6ef9 (marker absent / operator content present) and pass-after @29f4cc9; each asserts BOTH user-marker-present AND operator-markers-absent. Download structured-render branch (_branded_content) exercised by test_download_resume_serves_users_own_content_not_operator_pdf (POST /resumes -> formatHash matches no bundled asset -> resolve_original_pdf None -> branded render), passes.
94 passed in 137.13s @29f4cc9 across the 7 targeted files. Email-agent test-stub signature updates (lambda *a,**k) preserve intent.

MV-cover-letter-studio-006 fixed: expanded _KEYWORD_BOILERPLATE + deterministic _skill_score ranking before the [:10] cap (cover_letters.py). test_keyword_coverage_drops_boilerplate_and_surfaces_buried_skills fails-before / passes-after; boilerplate (details/visit/anti-scrape/notice/tag/required/skills) dropped, real skills (Kubernetes/Docker/Terraform/PostgreSQL) surface. No prohibited randomness.

No scope creep beyond the finding set; additive module + optional params, no DB migration, public APIs intact. No --no-verify, no Math.random metrics, no eslint-disable/@ts-ignore in production code (only pre-existing '# type: ignore' on a test lambda stub). No node_modules in the diff (all apps/api Python).

blocking_issues: no_resume_fallback_safe=false (HIGH, cross-account PII leak, OUTBOUND): a fresh no-resume user's cover-letter prompt is grounded on the operator's bundled PDF. Proven @29f4cc9: CoverLetterAgent.run(fresh_uuid) prompt contains 'VIKRAM DESHPANDE', 'sarkar.vikram@gmail.com', '+61 433 224 556', 'Australian Taxation Office', 'linkedin.com/in/vikramd-profile'. Ungated: app/routers/agents.py:876 (coverLetter), :888 (emailAgent). Same class applies to email_agent draft (app/agents/email_agent.py:293) and refine_cover_letter (app/routers/cover_letters.py:422). Root: app/services/resume_grounding.py:37/55 operator fallback used unconditionally on OUTBOUND paths.

NF-final-B-005 resurrected for no-resume users (HIGH, OUTBOUND download/attachment): app/agents/cover_letter_agent.py:1408 -> TailoringAgent.ensure_base_resume (app/agents/tailor_agent.py:300-325) parses the operator PDF and persists it as the user's OWN base (sections + formatHash = operator PDF sha256). Proven @29f4cc9: after seeding, GET /resumes/{id}/download returns HTTP 200 PDF containing operator PII (DESHPANDE / +61 433 224 556 / Australian Taxation Office) because app/services/resume_pdf.py:96-99 matches the bundled file by hash and app/routers/resumes.py:296 serves it verbatim. tailor_agent.ensure_base_resume was NOT rewired by this diff.

Sticky leak: once ensure_base_resume seeds operator content as a no-resume user's base, ALL user-scoped helpers (fit_scorer, job_insights, cover_letter_insights, email draft, letterhead contact) faithfully return operator content as 'the user's own', defeating the fix for that account.
required_remediation: Gate every OUTBOUND generation path (coverLetter, emailAgent draft/refine, resume download/attachment) on the caller having their OWN resume; do NOT fall back to the operator PDF for outbound artifacts — block with a 'upload a resume first' error or fall back to non-operator/empty grounding.

Fix tailor_agent.ensure_base_resume so a no-resume user is never seeded with the operator PDF as their base (or exclude the seeded base from bundled-hash matching in resolve_original_pdf so download never serves operator bytes).
The internal-analytics fallback (story_extractor) may remain per MV-story-bank-006; the OUTBOUND paths must not.
non_blocking_notes: Removing @lru_cache from _resume_text/_resume_contact means per-user DB read (+ parse_resume_pdf on the no-resume fallback) per call; fit_scorer resolves once outside the job loop (fine). Minor, not a regression.

The 8 new tests enshrine the operator-PDF fallback as expected (test_resolve_user_resume_text_falls_back_to_bundled_when_no_base asserts text==operator text). This is a design decision that bakes in the outbound-unsafe fallback; revisit alongside the gating remediation.
